name: Fresh Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from spinach; wash leaves thoroughly and pat dry. Tear into bite-size pieces.
2. Quickly rinse mushrooms in cold water; drain well, and slice thinly.
3. Combine spinach, mushrooms, onion, and bacon in a large bowl; set aside.
4. In a container of electric blender, combine salad oil, sugar, mustard, onion juice, and salt. Blend well.
5. Remove lid of container, and slowly add vinegar while the blender is running.
6. Toss spinach mixture with dressing until well coated. Season with salt and pepper.
